name: wealthAPI
description: The wealthAPI API is a RESTful interface for accessing the wealthAPI system programmatically. It provides endpoints for account, investment and transaction management and analytics (PURE core API) as well as access to brokerage connections (brokerage API). The API uses JWT bearer token authentication and supports mandator-based multi-tenancy.
